# Spec: Contained CLI fixes

## Intent

Five contained CLI correctness fixes: restrict the worktree-resolution fallback to `swarm/*`
branches; render each spec's diagnostics in the whole-workspace check surface; keep a keyed
malformed verify block + a vacuous status-pass surfaced and dedupe the uncovered loop; confine
the show-artifact ref to the workspace; and make board derivation deterministic + deduped.

## Non-goals

- Not a change to the frozen checks contract (checks.yaml, severities, IDs).
- Not the owner-gated conflict-fact surface (#26(b)).

## Requirements

### AC-001 — worktree fallback restricted to swarm/* branches

When resolving a worktree by slug tail, the fallback must only match `swarm/*` branches, so
`swarm run` can never launch into an unrelated non-swarm worktree.

Verify with: `pnpm run test:run` (the resolveReviewRun regression spec)

### AC-002 — workspace report renders each spec's diagnostics

When the whole-workspace check renders its human surface, it must show which check failed + line
per spec, like `--json`.

Verify with: `pnpm run test:run` (the render regression spec)

### AC-003 — verify-binding + coverage facts keyed correctly

A keyed malformed verify block must surface regardless of row result; a `status: pass` with zero
rows must flag a contradiction; the uncovered coverage loop must dedupe.

Verify with: `pnpm run test:run` (the checksContract + reconcileFacts regression specs)

### AC-004 — show-artifact confined; board deterministic

Show-artifact must confine task/review stems and the spec path-fallback to the workspace; board
derivation must sort frontmatter reads and dedupe needs-human.

Verify with: `pnpm run test:run` (the showArtifact + deriveBoard regression specs)

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/modules/Core/useCases/taskLocator.ts`
- `src/modules/Core/useCases/deriveBoard.ts`
- `src/modules/Core/services/checksContract.ts`
- `src/modules/Core/services/reconcileFacts.ts`
- `src/modules/Tui/services/render.ts`
- `src/modules/Core/useCases/showArtifact.ts`

# Task: Wave 3 — contained CLI fixes (#24, #26, #32, #37, #42)

## Source

- Spec: `specs/cli-fixes/spec.md` (SPEC-cli-fixes)

## Scope

- **#24 (MAJOR)** `resolve_worktree` fell back to ANY branch whose tail matched the slug → `swarm run`
  into an unrelated non-swarm worktree. Restrict the fallback to `swarm/*` branches.
- **#37 (MAJOR)** the whole-workspace `swarm check` human render dropped every spec's diagnostics.
- **#32** C013 keyed-malformed block on a non-Pass row silently dropped (I1, AC-004); `status: pass`
  with zero rows reads clean (I2); C012 uncovered loop not deduped (I3).
- **#42 (MINOR)** `swarm show` read files outside the workspace — confine the ref.
- **#26 (MINOR)** `derive_board` nondeterministic + double-counts on multi-review tasks (sort + dedup).

## Do not change

- The frozen checks contract (checks.yaml, severities, IDs). The owner-gated #26(b) conflict-fact
  surface is NOT in scope (only the (a) sort+dedupe baseline).

## Affected areas

- `src/modules/Core/useCases/taskLocator.ts` (#24)
- `src/modules/Core/useCases/deriveBoard.ts` (#26)
- `src/modules/Core/services/checksContract.ts` (#32 I1/I3)
- `src/modules/Core/services/reconcileFacts.ts` (#32 I2)
- `src/modules/Tui/services/render.ts` (#37)
- `src/modules/Core/useCases/showArtifact.ts` (#42)

## Verify

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` · `pnpm run test:run` (611 pass) · `pnpm run lint` · `pnpm run deps:validate`
- [ ] new regression tests per issue (#24 non-swarm fallback → no worktree; #37 diagnostics rendered;
  #32 malformed-on-non-Pass + vacuous-pass + uncovered-dedup; #42 outside-spec refused; #26 dedup)

## Agent instructions

1. Five independent fixes; stay in scope; paste real Verify output; re-read as a skeptic.

## Run summary

- Changed files: taskLocator, deriveBoard, checksContract, reconcileFacts, render, showArtifact + specs.
  Landed swarm-cli `cac35d3`.
- Verify results: `typecheck` 0 · `test:run` 0 (611 pass, 604 baseline + 7 new) · `lint` 0 ·
  `deps:validate` 0. Independent review REVIEW-remediation-w3: pass (all gates re-run, each fix probed).
- Out-of-scope edits: none. (#26(b) conflict-fact surface correctly deferred — owner decision.)
- Blocked questions: none.
